title: NATP Module 11: Nutrition
purpose: Examine the body's need for food and the effect of food on the body; basic food groups, nutrients, therapeutic diets, and assisting residents to meet nutrition and hydration needs.
clinical_boundary: Six source-recommended clinical hours are deferred and are not online credit.

objectives.weight_reason: Source-density allocation from 2-hour theory total; assessment, clinical, certificate, and optional support time excluded.
source_density_basis: use terms in proper charting/reporting context
objectives.excluded_clinical_minutes: Source recommends 6 clinical hours overall; deferred and not counted as online theory.
content_outline: use terms in proper charting/reporting context
recommended_teaching_strategies: Games: word searches, crossword puzzles, Family Feud, Jeopardy, bingo, spelling bee, hangman, concentration
handouts: Handout 11.1b Nutrition Crossword Puzzle KEY (internal/instructor key)
objectives.sample_test_items: Module 11 sample test pages 13-18 include related items; answer key page 19 internal-only.
safety_reporting_charting_scope_boundari: CNA follows ordered diet/feeding plan, observes, records intake/output where assigned, documents/reports changes, allergies, dysphagia/choking/aspiration signs, tube/IV alarms or site concerns to licensed nurse; no online hands-on competency validation.
media_opportunities: source-traced diet/feeding/hydration diagram prompt; no PHI
image_requirements: Source-traced visual for Nutrition Flashcard Deck
Source-traced visual for Crossword Quest
Source-traced visual for Five-Term Diet Report Sentence
narration_requirements: Objective 1 intro transcript
Activity instruction/debrief transcripts; JSON batch import only; audio generation gated.

objectives.objective_title: Describe therapeutic diets commonly ordered for patients/residents and the responsibilities of the Nurse Assistant
objectives.exact_objective_statement: Describe therapeutic diets commonly ordered for patients/residents and the responsibilities of the Nurse Assistant
objectives.weight_reason: Source-density allocation from 2-hour theory total; assessment, clinical, certificate, and optional support time excluded.
source_density_basis: therapeutic diets: low sodium, diabetic, low fat, low cholesterol, liquid, bland
liquid diets: clear/full/thickened nectar or honey
special consistency: mechanical soft, pureed, soft

NA responsibilities: ordered diet, ID/diet card checks, report problems, open containers, I&O monitoring, food intake recording, refusal handling, no extra food/condiments without checking, temperatures, do not mix pureed foods, upright eating
objectives.excluded_clinical_minutes: Source recommends 6 clinical hours overall; deferred and not counted as online theory.
content_outline: therapeutic diets: low sodium, diabetic, low fat, low cholesterol, liquid, bland
liquid diets: clear/full/thickened nectar or honey
special consistency: mechanical soft, pureed, soft

NA responsibilities: ordered diet, ID/diet card checks, report problems, open containers, I&O monitoring, food intake recording, refusal handling, no extra food/condiments without checking, temperatures, do not mix pureed foods, upright eating
recommended_teaching_strategies: Review allowed/restricted foods/fluids for therapeutic diets
clinical_demonstration_method_of_evaluat: Correctly identify residents and check diet card for name/order/instructions/allergies

objectives.objective_title: Describe proper techniques for feeding patients/residents
objectives.exact_objective_statement: Describe proper techniques for feeding patients/residents
objectives.weight_reason: Source-density allocation from 2-hour theory total; assessment, clinical, certificate, and optional support time excluded.
source_density_basis: comfortable feeding atmosphere and eye-level seating
encourage participation and pace; do not rush
follow feeding plans, small pieces/amounts, wait to swallow
upright during/30 minutes after eating, thicken liquids as ordered, choking signs
objectives.excluded_clinical_minutes: Source recommends 6 clinical hours overall; deferred and not counted as online theory.
content_outline: comfortable feeding atmosphere and eye-level seating
encourage participation and pace; do not rush
follow feeding plans, small pieces/amounts, wait to swallow
upright during/30 minutes after eating, thicken liquids as ordered, choking signs
clinical_demonstration_method_of_evaluat: Use proper feeding techniques with/without swallowing difficulty
